details.IncidentDetail: "[1] #4 AT THE END OF THE ONR "

details.IncidentDetail: "[12] SBCC DRIVER IN WHI SDN VS BLK TOYT CAM // 35 YOA MALE CON AND STILL BREATHING [Shared]"
"[11] TOYT CAM WAS THE PARKED VEH [Shared]"
"[10] WHI SDN VS BLK TOYT CAM [Shared]"
"[3] [Appended, 00:53:56] [1] ALL PER SBSO******VEH TC'S INTO PARKED VEH -- UNK IF INJ "
"[80] 85-4 MTZ JUST GOT VEH OO CANAL "
"[76] MTZ ENRT TO THE SHOP 15-20 MIN ETA "
"[73] 85-6 4 WILL STANDBY FOR TOW // ENRT TO ECRMC FOR MEDICAL CLEARANCE BM SAME AS EM"
"[70] 85-6 NORMA ADV AFFIRM ON TOW WILL PAY W/ CC"
"[65] MTZ TOW - 2 HR LABOR WILL BE 120 LABOR PER HOUR // PLUS AFTER HOUR 150 FEE AND TOW 100 - TOTAL $490"
"[61] C85-004 FOR LINE 59 1022 - WE CHECKED DRAIN DITCH NO DMG TO STRUCTURAL "
"[60] C85-004 INQ W/ MTZ WHAT COST IT WILL BE FOR RECOVERY APPROX 1/2 MI TO DROP OFF VEH AT RESIDENCE"
"[56] 85-4 START 1185 FOR A VEH APPROX 10-15 FT DOWN DRAINAGE DITCH "
"[54] C85-004 DOOR IS OPEN WERE ABLE TO LOCATE THE DRIVER CD 4"
"[39] AMR WILL STANDBY REQ TO KNOW ETA "
"[38] WILL CALL AMR TO HAVE THEM STAY WITH THE VEH "
"[34] ICSO CPS TO HAVE FD STAY WITH THE VEH "
"[30] 85-6 HAVE THEM STAY W THE VEH "
"[22] 85-6 VIA LL WILL GO TALK TO THEM TO MAKE SURE IT DID HAPPEN EARLIER AND THERES NO INJURY TO THE PTY "

"[21] 85-6 VIA LL - PER THE RP HE JUST DROVE UP SAW THE VEH IN THE DIRT DRAIN CANAL, NO DMG, THE NEIGHBOR OR FAMILY MEMBER OF THE OWNER OF THE CAR SAID THIS CRASH HAPPENED EARLIER AND PLANNING TO WINCH IT OUT LATER WITH THEIR OWN TOW TK. WILL BE ENRT TO THE ADDRESS TO GET ADDITIONAL INFO. KEEP FD ENRT. "
"[20] C85-006 VEH IS 1124 , PER THE RP PTY LEFT TO THEIR RESIDENCE SHOULD BE THE ONE ON THE 28 "
"[14] RP NOW STATING THE VEH OWNER IS ON SCENE"
"[9] MAR SENTRA APPEARS ITS ON, UNK TYPE SOUND COMING FROM THE VEH "
"[1] ,STRONG GUSTY WINDS TADV ALL VEHS AND WINNEBAGOS"
